p269a_lite_no_go.note: P269A-Lite top recommendation was NO_GO; C05/C06 are LOW-plausibility WATCHLIST; user explicitly accepted this pathway.

low_plausibility_warning: LOW hit-rate plausibility pathway. Expected result was null (L82 signal space exhaustion). Single-shot test: if null, C05/C06 are permanently CLOSED.

h1_method.hypothesis: Saturday vs Mon-Fri M3+ rate difference
h1_method.metric: M3+ (P265A SSOT: draw-level any-bet hit_count>=3, special_hit excluded)

endpoint.definition: temporal OOS last 1765 eligible DAILY_539 draws
endpoint.coverage_note: Replay store covers the most-recent 1,500 distinct draws; 6 of those are Sundays (excluded by pre-registered rule), leaving 1,494 evaluable OOS draws. Subset is purely temporal/structural, declared in the registry entry before any outcome look.

scans_performed: NONE — single pre-registered boundary, no weekday/threshold/lottery scan

explicit_non_claims.statement: This is a pre-registered statistical test result only. It does not improve win rate, does not predict lottery numbers, does not authorize betting advice, and does not constitute a strategy recommendation.
